# Roshan R Sivakumar — Personal Website
# https://roshanrsivakumar.com
# llms.txt · AI & LLM Context File

## About

**Roshan R Sivakumar** is the **Chief Operating Officer (COO) of RR Hevirex Coach Builders**, an industrial coach building and manufacturing company based in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.

He holds:
- **MSc in Information Systems** — Virginia Commonwealth University (VCU), Richmond, Virginia, USA (2023–2024)
- **BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration)** — Christ University, Bengaluru, Karnataka, India (2020–2023)

He also holds a third degree (details available on the site).

## Professional Identity

- **Current Role**: Chief Operating Officer, RR Hevirex Coach Builders
- **Location**: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- **Industries**: Industrial Manufacturing, Coach Building, Operations Management, Business Analytics
- **Brand**: myThrivehood (personal growth platform and brand)

## Core Expertise

- Operations Management and Lean Manufacturing
- Six Sigma (DMAIC, DFSS)
- Value Stream Mapping (VSM)
- Business Analytics: Descriptive, Decision, Risk, and Forecasting Analytics
- Information Systems
- Supply Chain Management
- Strategic Planning and Executive Leadership

## Academic Highlights

### Virginia Commonwealth University (VCU) — MSc Information Systems (2023–2024)
- Location: Richmond, Virginia, USA
- Duration: 10 months
- Achievement: **AMA Best Spokesperson Award** — American Marketing Association, VCU Chapter, Fall Induction Ceremony
- Courses: Descriptive Analytics, Business Data Analytics, Decision Analytics, Risk Analytics, Forecasting Methods, Operations Management
- Notable: Professor James Eggleston (Six Sigma); Desk Assistant in student residential housing
- Notable experiences: first snowfall, Diwali celebration, Onam, Halloween, trips to Outer Banks NC, Philadelphia (Rocky Statue), Washington DC (National Art Gallery)

### Christ University — BBA (2020–2023)
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- Achievement: **3rd Prize — Chrizellenz 2024 Business Analytics Competition**
- Activities: Ushus organising committee, Pioneer Club, TVW cohort, Theatre Workshop (June 2024), Vara Foundation
- Peers: TVW classmates, L3 classmates (Lean Operations and Systems Department)

## Key Quotes

> "Ten months of sleepless nights, 7,000 miles from family — and I would do every single day of it again without hesitation."
— On his MSc at VCU

> "Christ University didn't just give me a degree — it gave me a way of thinking."
— On his BBA at Christ University

This site uses Schema.org JSON-LD for: Person, Organization (RR Hevirex Coach Builders), WebSite, WebPage, BlogPosting, ImageGallery, ImageObject, BreadcrumbList, ContactPage.

Geo targeting: IN-KA (Bengaluru, Karnataka, India). Also references: Richmond VA USA, Bengaluru Karnataka India.
